name: Placebo Pheromone
descrip: Convince your opponent you have an innate pheromone that will get them increasingly horny. Requires mouth free.
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] smirks as [AttackerHeOrShe] seductively explains how [AttackerHisOrHer] scent is going to have an effect on [TargetName], and [TargetHeOrShe] flushes deeply thinking it's already taking hold!
statusMiss: [AttackerName] smirks as [AttackerHeOrShe] seductively explains how [AttackerHisOrHer] scent is going to have an effect on [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] doesn't buy it!
